name: Let Us Begin the World of Violence!!!

issues.description: Missing required condition: LeaderHasType multicolored. Card text states 'If your Leader is multicolored' but DSL has Always.
Missing second action: ReturnToHand. Card text includes 'Then, return up to 1 Character with a cost of 5 or less to the owner's hand' but only DrawCard is present.
DrawCard count is 2 but card text specifies 'draw 1 card'.
